# 📺 YouTube Video Guide for MASH Blog & Recipes

**Created:** December 8, 2025  
**Purpose:** Guide for finding and adding YouTube videos to recipes and growing guides

---

## 🎬 How to Find YouTube Video IDs

The YouTube video ID is the 11-character code in the URL:
- Full URL: `https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ`
- Video ID: `dQw4w9WgXcQ`
- Short URL: `https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ` → Same ID

---

## 🍄 Recommended YouTube Channels for Mushroom Content

### For Growing Guides:

| Channel | Focus | Style | Best For |
|---------|-------|-------|----------|
| **Southwest Mushrooms** | Growing tutorials | Professional, detailed | Kit guides |
| **FreshCap Mushrooms** | Science + growing | Educational | Technical info |
| **Mossy Creek Mushrooms** | Home cultivation | Beginner-friendly | Basics |
| **North Spore** | Professional cultivation | High-quality | Advanced |
| **Fungi Perfecti** | Paul Stamets content | Scientific | Expert level |
| **The Mushroom Forager** | Wild + cultivated | Nature-focused | Identification |

| Channel | Focus | Style | Best For |

| **Mariah Milano** | Asian fusion | Clear instructions | Asian recipes |
| **Pro Home Cooks** | Technique-focused | Educational | Skill building |

| **Adam Ragusea** | Home cooking science | Practical | Tips & tricks |

## 🔍 Search Queries for Finding Videos

### Growing Guides:

```
"how to grow oyster mushrooms at home kit"
"shiitake mushroom growing kit tutorial"
"lion's mane mushroom cultivation beginner"
"king oyster mushroom growing guide"
"blue oyster mushroom kit instructions"
"mushroom growing kit troubleshooting"
"mushroom fruiting conditions explained"
"how to harvest mushrooms from kit"
```

### Cooking Recipes:

```
"mushroom chicharon recipe Filipino"
"garlic butter mushroom recipe"
"creamy mushroom pasta recipe"
"mushroom adobo vegetarian"
"mushroom sisig Filipino"
"oyster mushroom stir fry"
"shiitake mushroom recipe Asian"
"lion's mane mushroom cooking"
"king oyster mushroom scallops recipe"
```

---

## 📋 Video Selection Criteria

When selecting videos for MASH content, look for:

✅ **Good Qualities:**
- Clear audio and video quality
- Step-by-step instructions
- Shows actual results
- Reasonable length (5-15 minutes ideal)
- Positive comments and engagement
- Recent upload (within 2-3 years)
- Uses similar products/methods to MASH kits

❌ **Avoid:**
- Poor audio/video quality
- Overly long (>30 minutes) without chapters
- Outdated information
- Controversial or misleading content
- Heavy product placement for competitors
- Videos with many dislikes or negative comments

---

---

## 🛠️ How to Add Videos in Sanity Studio

### For Recipes:

1. Open Sanity Studio (`cd studio && npm run dev`)
2. Go to **Recipes** in the sidebar
3. Select a recipe to edit
4. Scroll to **Video Content** section
5. In **YouTube Video**:
   - Enter the 11-character **Video ID**
   - Add a **Video Title**
   - Set **Start Time** (in seconds) if needed
   - Toggle **Show on Recipe Page** (usually ON)
6. Click **Publish**

### For Growing Guides:

1. Open Sanity Studio
2. Go to **Growing Guides** in the sidebar
3. Select a guide to edit
4. Scroll to **Video Content** section
5. In **Main YouTube Video**:
   - Enter the **Video ID**
   - Add a **Video Title**
   - Set **Start Time** if starting mid-video
   - Toggle **Show on Guide Page**
6. Add **Additional Videos** if multiple videos are helpful
7. Click **Publish**

---

## 💡 Creating MASH Original Videos

### Recommended Equipment:

| Item | Budget Option | Professional |
|------|---------------|--------------|
| Camera | Smartphone (iPhone/Android) | Sony ZV-1 / A6400 |
| Microphone | Lavalier mic (₱500) | Rode VideoMic |
| Lighting | Ring light (₱1,000) | Softbox kit |
| Tripod | Basic phone tripod | Fluid head tripod |
| Background | Clean kitchen/shelf | Branded backdrop |

### Video Content Ideas:

**Growing Guides (5-10 min each):**
1. "Unboxing Your MASH Mushroom Kit"
2. "Day-by-Day Oyster Mushroom Growth Timelapse"
3. "Common Mistakes When Growing Mushrooms"
4. "How to Get 3+ Flushes from Your Kit"
5. "MASH Mushroom Kit vs Store-Bought: Quality Comparison"

**Recipe Videos (3-8 min each):**
1. "5-Minute Garlic Butter Mushrooms"
2. "Filipino Mushroom Chicharon - Crispy Vegetarian Snack"
3. "Restaurant-Style Creamy Mushroom Pasta at Home"
4. "Mushroom Adobo - Classic Filipino Flavor, Meatless"
5. "3 Easy Oyster Mushroom Recipes for Beginners"

---

## 🔗 Integration with Products

When adding videos to recipes, also link ingredients to products:

1. In the recipe's **Ingredients** section
2. For mushroom ingredients, click **Link to Product**
3. Search for the corresponding MASH product
4. This enables "Shop Ingredients" feature on recipe page

Example:
- Recipe: Mushroom Chicharon
- Ingredient: "500g Fresh Oyster Mushrooms"
- Linked Product: MASH Fresh Oyster Mushrooms (₱X)

---

## 📈 Video Performance Tracking

Track which videos drive the most engagement:

1. Add UTM parameters to product links from recipes
2. Monitor which recipes get the most views
3. Check if video recipes convert better than text-only
4. A/B test thumbnail images

---

## 🚀 Quick Start: Add Videos Now

Run these migration scripts to populate sample content:

```bash
# Add sample recipes with placeholder video IDs
node scripts/migrate-recipes-to-sanity.js

# Add sample growing guides with placeholder video IDs
node scripts/migrate-growing-guides-to-sanity.js
```

Then in Sanity Studio:
1. Replace placeholder video IDs with real ones
2. Add images to recipes and guides
3. Link products to ingredients
4. Publish and test!

---

**Need help?** Check the YouTube channels listed above for high-quality content to embed or get inspiration for creating MASH original videos.
